description: You are a 4th-grade teacher at an OLPC-equipped rural school with no internet access. Create a self-grading interactive math practice quiz as an HTML file saved to /home/ga/Documents/math_quiz.html. The file must include a '4th Grade Math Challenge' title and heading, exactly five math questions (7 x 8, 144 / 12, 15 x 13, 256 / 16, and 3 x (4 + 5)) with text input fields, a 'Check Answers' button that triggers JavaScript logic to grade the inputs and display a score message (e.g., 'You got X out of 5 correct!'), and basic CSS styling for readability.
